content_body: The house was so spacious - large bedrooms, wonderful porch with beautiful view. Nice large dining table for our family of eight. WiFi worked well. It felt very private. We enjoyed making s’mores in the fireplace at the Treehouse and several of us made good use of the hot tub. There's a sloping trail to the fire pit & gazebo area down by the creek. We enjoyed the town of Blue Ridge and the nearby Mercier orchard. We would definitely rent this home again!
title: Beautiful Large Cabin in Blue Ridge, GA!
